title: Mediums Proseminar
tagline: Media theory seminar for MDes students, co-led with Allen Sayegh at Harvard GSD
description: A media theory seminar for incoming MDes students, co-led with domain head Allen Sayegh, pairing critical theory with hands-on experiential learning in different media.
what: Co-led the Mediums domain seminar with Allen Sayegh for incoming MDes students. Paired critical design readings with experiential learning: students visited the Harvard glass flower collection comparing simulacra with originals; responded to Berger's Ways of Seeing by making short films in the Fogg Art Museum for an in-class festival; shared personal design practices for critique, leading to unexpected collaborations and the first sale of one student's work to another.
why: If the medium is the message (McLuhan), the pedagogical challenge is how to render the medium visible and pliable. By teaching about each medium through a combination of mediums, students gained the agency to extend their practices by understanding each one's unique affordances.
